title: Software Developer
description:
I have been working as a freelance developer specializing in AI and ML projects. Here are some of the projects I've developed:

Code-Interpreter: (https://github.com/haseeb-heaven/code-interpreter)

Created a Code Interpreter that combines GPT, Gemini, Claude, and LLaMa models, simplifying tasks from basic file management to advanced multimedia conversion and data analysis, all through natural language commands.

Gemini-Interpreter: (https://github.com/haseeb-heaven/Gemini-Interpreter)

Gemini, a code generator and interpreter for Google Gemini, harnessing Python, Google Cloud, and GPT technologies to facilitate seamless code generation and interpretation​.

LangChain-Coder: (https://github.com/haseeb-heaven/LangChain-Coder)

A web application capable of generating code, fixing bugs, and executing tasks using GPT(OpenAI) and Codey(VertexAI) technologies, significantly enhancing automated code generation and bug resolution processes​.

CodeRunner-Plugin: (https://github.com/haseeb-heaven/CodeRunner-Plugin)

Created a CodeRunner plugin enabling code execution and saving directly within Chat-GPT in the browser, supporting over 70+ languages and employing FastAPI, REST API, and GPT-4 technologies for enhanced functionality​.
